name: Context Nexus
description: Persistent cross-session memory, structured observability, secrets management, and replay for OpenClaw agents. Local-first SQLite by default.

dbPath.description: Path to SQLite database file. Default: ~/.openclaw/context-nexus/nexus.db

encryptionKey.description: Custom encryption key for secrets. Default: env CONTEXT_NEXUS_ENCRYPTION_KEY

sessionScope.description: Default scope for session memory. Default: durable

compactInterval.description: Compact memories every N events. Default: 100
